name: Strained Eye Balls
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Creepy Cuisine, Lucy Munroe
1. Place the eggs in a saucepan and cover them with cold water.
2. Cook over high heat until the water begins to boil.
3. Turn the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Remove the cooked eggs from the saucepan and place them in cold water.
5. When the eggs are cool enough to touch, crack the eggshells all over by rolling them on a hard surface.
6. Peel away the shells carefully.
7. Cut each egg in half widthwise.
8. Remove the yolks from the eggs and fill the holes with whipped cream cheese.
9. Press an olive into each cream cheese eyeball, pimiento facing up, for an eerie green iris.
10. For a startling red pupil, dip the tip of a toothpick in red food coloring and draw broken blood vessels in the cream cheese.
